nasb.text: Let all the earth fear the Lord; Let all the inhabitants of the world stand in awe of Him.

esv.text: Let all the earth fear the Lord; let all the inhabitants of the world stand in awe of him!

cnv.text: 願全地都敬畏耶和華， 願世上的居民都懼怕他。

ccb.text: 愿普世都敬畏耶和华！ 愿世人都尊崇祂！

csbs.text: 愿全地都敬畏耶和华， 愿世上所有的居民都惧怕他；
